description: This file defines functions and types related to generating and rendering placeholders, including parsing HTML with placeholders, generating placeholder attributes, and converting placeholders to HTML strings. It is part of a larger project involving HTML and SVG placeholder components.

methods.name: getPlaceholder
methods.description: Generates a placeholder object (either 'img' or 'svg') with appropriate attributes based on user options.

methods.name: replacePlaceholdersInHtml
methods.description: Replaces <Placeholder /> components in HTML markup with generated HTML content, parsing the input HTML and rendering placeholders accordingly.

methods.name: renderPlaceholderToString
methods.description: Converts a placeholder object into its corresponding HTML string representation.

methods.name: getOptionsWithDefaults
methods.description: Merges user-provided options with default values for placeholder configuration.

methods.name: getPlaceholderSrc
methods.description: Creates a data URI for an SVG placeholder image based on options.

methods.name: sanitizeHtmlAttributesFromMdx
methods.description: Sanitizes HTML attributes extracted from MDX, converting string booleans to actual booleans.
